name: Green Tomato Relish by Mavis Vawter
recipeInstructions:
1. After chopping the vegetables, drain off any liquid and discard it.
2. Combine all ingredients in a Dutch oven.
3. Bring to a boil and maintain a boil for 20 minutes.
4. Pour into hot sterilized pint jars, leaving 1/2-inch of headspace at the top of each jar.
5. Seal with hot lids and rings.
6. Process the jars for 10 minutes in boiling water bath.
